# CTOS Portfolio Roadmap
# Foundation Layer (RMD v1.0)

## Objective
Establish a production-grade foundation before advanced motion, SVG morphing, visitor globe, and authority-building features.

---

# Current State Assessment

Current score:
- Personal Branding: 9.5/10
- Information Architecture: 9.5/10
- Technical Architecture: 10/10
- Motion System: 6.5/10
- SVG System: 7/10
- PRD Compliance: 8.8/10

Primary gaps:
1. Hero System Visualization
2. Command Palette
3. SVG Architecture Upgrade
4. Motion Foundation
5. Design Token Consolidation

---

# Foundation Success Criteria

The foundation phase is complete when:

- Navigation system is finalized.
- Design tokens are centralized.
- Command palette works globally.
- Hero architecture map is implemented.
- SVG system is standardized.
- Reduced motion is supported.
- Lighthouse >= 90.
- All interactive islands are documented.

---

# Sprint 0 — Architecture Audit

## Goals
Create a stable baseline.

## Tasks

### Repository Audit
- Audit src/pages
- Audit src/components
- Audit src/content
- Audit assets
- Audit styling architecture

### Technical Debt Register
Create:

/docs/technical-debt.md

Track:
- duplicated logic
- duplicated styles
- oversized components
- dead code
- temporary hacks

### Deliverables
- Architecture Report
- Technical Debt Report

---

# Sprint 1 — Design Foundation

## Goal
Create a unified design language.

### Task 1
Design Tokens

Create:

src/styles/tokens/

Files:
- colors.css
- spacing.css
- radius.css
- shadows.css
- typography.css
- motion.css

### Acceptance Criteria
- No hardcoded colors.
- No hardcoded spacing.
- No duplicated typography values.

---

### Task 2
Theme System Hardening

Requirements:
- Dark
- Light
- System

Persist with localStorage.

### Acceptance Criteria
- No theme flicker.
- SSR-safe.

---

### Task 3
Global Container System

Standardize:
- max width
- section spacing
- responsive spacing

Deliverables:
- Container.astro
- Section.astro
- PageWrapper.astro

---

# Sprint 2 — Navigation Foundation

## Goal
Build premium navigation.

### Navigation Features

Desktop:
- floating navbar
- glass surface
- hide on scroll down
- reveal on scroll up

Mobile:
- bottom navigation

### Components

/navigation
- Header
- MobileNav
- ThemeSwitcher
- LanguageSwitcher

### Acceptance Criteria

- keyboard accessible
- mobile friendly
- reduced motion support

---

# Sprint 3 — Command Palette

## Goal
Global navigation and search layer.

### Shortcut

CTRL + K
CMD + K

### Features

- page navigation
- project search
- notes search
- quick actions
- theme switch
- language switch

### Components

/components/command

- CommandPalette
- SearchResults
- CommandInput

### Acceptance Criteria

- opens under 100ms
- keyboard only navigation supported

---

# Sprint 4 — Hero System Visualization

## Goal
Replace static hero impression with architectural identity.

### Hero Architecture Map

Nodes:
- Infrastructure
- Cloud
- Automation
- AI
- Product
- Architecture

Connections:
- animated signals
- node linking
- hover interactions

### Interaction Layer

Hover:
- activate node
- show metadata

Click:
- expand detail panel

### Constraints

- SVG first
- avoid ThreeJS
- maintain performance

### Acceptance Criteria

- interactive under 60fps
- no CLS
- works on mobile

---

# Sprint 5 — SVG Foundation

## Goal
Create reusable SVG ecosystem.

### Structure

/assets/svg/
- infrastructure
- cloud
- automation
- ai
- architecture

### Requirements

- optimized SVG
- shared stroke system
- consistent visual language

### Future Morph Chains

Infrastructure
→ Cloud
→ Automation
→ AI
→ Architecture

---

# Sprint 6 — Motion Foundation

## Goal
Establish reusable animation engine.

### Libraries

- GSAP
- Motion One
- Lenis

### Modules

lib/animations/

- reveal.ts
- navigation.ts
- cards.ts
- hero.ts
- svg.ts

### Rules

No animation logic inside pages.

All animations reusable.

### Motion Tokens

Fast: 120ms
Normal: 220ms
Slow: 400ms
Reveal: 600ms

---

# Definition of Done

Foundation Layer is complete when:

- Hero System Map exists.
- Command Palette exists.
- Design Tokens centralized.
- SVG System standardized.
- Navigation finalized.
- Motion engine established.
- Accessibility validated.
- Lighthouse >= 90.

---

# Next Layer

After Foundation Layer:

02-content-layer.rmd
03-architecture-layer.rmd
04-experience-layer.rmd
05-motion-layer.rmd
06-authority-layer.rmd
07-optimization-layer.rmd
08-launch-layer.rmd
